textByHashes.06b1ad083daf4de40afe10bff76d15909948e9bb: Hello! Don't get in the way around here, we've got a lot of work to do!
textByHashes.f06fd9ede042d36208f45603699043c3c0af8ac8: Well, it's quite exciting... we're extending the glider network to include the Feldip Hills so that people can come and look at these curious ogres.
textByHashes.d0715e5df5a03a67afb8309c99869aa986b46e2b: They are impressive creatures aren't they - quite mystified they are by the technology we gnomes have invented.
textByHashes.57fbc20e33a6e92a5c2ca51beb4e53ab29ecce93: Well, people will be able to visit this area, once construction has finished, by using the most advanced network of glider routes in the whole of Gielinor... in fact, the only network of glider routes!
textByHashes.656983f6ce8e376a806770a7a4d93bffbaf5c07d: Not really, I'm afraid, it's probably all far too technical for someone like you.
textByHashes.b89671f6c282ef2e6b4bf15f1b686f401d6e5870: Rantz? [gasp] Well, that would be nice actually! We are having some problems with getting the landing lights to work... do you think you could take a look at them?
textByHashes.1cd7db69cac1a024902ccf04f4858e00398e725c: I expect that it's far too complex for you, but hey, you may be able to do something!
textByHashes.e26071f878e9235dae698d885fe0082bd1420a17: Ok then, just pop over and let me know if you're not sure what you're doing... I'm sure I'll just have to fix it myself anyway. If you need any materials, just pop over.
textByHashes.7e2f9ec6d5473997d4e396561297c94dddeefe95: Yes, I expected it might be a bit too complex for you. We Gnomes lead the way with technical things like this - world leaders, you might say.
textByHashes.14825c2f95df905c4c2a326e804f73d3a3dcd640: Go and take a look at those landing lights and see if you can get them to work, would you? They've been as dull as an ogre conversation since we started working here.
textByHashes.e78547d095f9e5f2eb5d67b62ab9340d22cc7f73: Come back and tell me if you actually manage to get them fixed.
textByHashes.7e131a3b08175365ff47394fd108970840808781: Okay, I can sell you one for 10 coins.
textByHashes.1d7e18b3aec36a896902b8c0ce0ceb0ad8ca1b58: So I can't sell you one then!
textByHashes.aa303fac3dca7f998f84d6e145ebb93b0456eb2f: Okay, many thanks for your custom.
textByHashes.2f07b0cc32ec85a30a6b3e7ff83c871caff04945: Fair enough, come back if you change your mind.
textByHashes.97da9894e46ecd2d0e7b67d9c7234b9c964bdc56: Broken something, have you? I'll want 500 coins for a new one. Be careful - my supplies are limited, and if I run out, you'll have to find your own materials elsewhere.
textByHashes.6a7b83a04c3bb8bc282eb80fea0a376c22b981f9: I can't give you one then.
textByHashes.4d2a7b2b451293754c44255dbb8e6d85a7d91734: Hmm. That seems a tad unlikely to me, but let's flick the switch here and see, shall we?!
textByHashes.4c6386eed910ccfa3937597e317d8daa3ce5ca56: I don't believe it - you fixed it! Well done, well done... We can pack up now and leave these ogres in peace.
textByHashes.7903959569059a6c91592d32a882347f6c859b34: Getting there now, thanks to your help!
textByHashes.e90b0e4df5b9fc6ad7e4f08cbaaed876ebb1889d: Oh my! I've had nothing to eat or drink but chompy birds and smelly water for days. Thank you.
textByHashes.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
